task_completion.description: Verify that the new archive user account has been created with the correct details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the WordPress Users list or the 'Add New User' screen, the username 'editorial_archives', email 'archives@localnews.com', Name 'Editorial Archives', and role 'Author' are visible.

task_completion.description: Verify that the draft 'Local Election Results Preview' has been moved to the Trash.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the WordPress Posts list, the post 'Local Election Results Preview' is either shown in the 'Trash' view, has a 'Trash' status next to it, or a confirmation message indicates it was moved to the trash.

task_completion.description: Verify that the draft 'Opinion: The Future of Remote Work' has been moved to the Trash.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the WordPress Posts list, the post 'Opinion: The Future of Remote Work' is either shown in the 'Trash' view, has a 'Trash' status next to it, or a confirmation message indicates it was moved to the trash.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'jdoe' account is being deleted and its content is reassigned to 'editorial_archives'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Delete Users' confirmation screen shows 'jdoe' being deleted, and the 'Attribute all content to:' radio button is selected with 'editorial_archives' chosen from the corresponding dropdown menu.

task_completion.description: Verify that 'jdoe' is successfully deleted and 'editorial_archives' owns the remaining published posts.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the WordPress Users list, 'jdoe' is no longer present, and 'editorial_archives' is listed with a post count of 4.

integrity.description: The agent used the WordPress web interface rather than terminal commands to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser interacting with the WordPress admin dashboard, not a terminal window executing wp-cli commands.

integrity.description: The agent actually navigated the WordPress site to perform actions.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser URL bar shows valid WordPress admin URLs (e.g., /wp-admin/users.php), and UI elements like dropdowns, checkboxes, and buttons are actively interacted with.

integrity.description: The bystander user 'asmith' was not modified or deleted.
integrity.visual_evidence: The user 'asmith' remains visible in the Users list and is never selected for deletion or modification in any screenshot.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target user to delete: 'jdoe' (initially has 4 published posts and 2 drafts). New archive user to create: 'editorial_archives' (Email: 'archives@localnews.com', Role: 'Author'). Drafts to trash: 'Local Election Results Preview' and 'Opinion: The Future of Remote Work'. Bystander user 'asmith' must remain untouched.
